goal: Validate that a generic task which asks for narrower scope triggers reviewer-led reassignment and still remains bounded.
strategy: Force a bounded replan path on one task and confirm that the orchestrator produces reviewer verdicts and a single reassignment instead of looping.

jobs.title: Verify documentation anchors under forced replan
jobs.instruction: Research the selected docs, but in this mock case force a narrower-scope replan so the orchestration path can be validated.
jobs.success_check: The replan path is bounded and reviewer-visible.

jobs.title: Synthesize bounded orchestration note
jobs.instruction: Synthesize a concise note explaining why bounded reassignment is safer than broad retries for a generic task.
jobs.success_check: The selected files support a bounded orchestration explanation.
